sample_prompts: give this housing a rounded finish without hand-building the modifier stack
apply a light panel finish preset to this part
thicken this shell with one finishing macro
zaokrąglij obudowę i dodaj lekki bevel oraz subdivision
pogrub tę skorupę jednym makrem wykończenia
wygładź i sfazuj ten obiekt jednym presetem
description: Bounded macro that applies one finishing preset stack to an object using controlled bevel, subdivision, or solidify combinations. Prefer this macro over manual modifier-by-modifier or bevel-plus-subdivision chaining when one preset matches the intent.
